title: Recruitment for a Cross-Defra coordinator for the AMR National Action Plan
body: "We have a vacancy for a Cross-Defra Coordinator.  Job Title  Cross-Defra Coordinator for the AMR National Action Plan  Grade  SEO  Salary & Pension  £44,500 per annum with Pension Scheme  Annual Leave entitlement  Commencing at 25 days  Role  This job puts you at the heart of the VMD’s AMR policy team as we deliver Defra’s commitments in the UK’s 5 year action plan for antimicrobial resistance, which supports the UK’s 20-year vision for AMR.    You will be responsible for coordinating cross-Defra delivery of the UK’s National Action Plan, alongside playing a critical role in coordinating the delivery of the VMD AMR team’s two flagship AMR surveillance reports.  How to apply  You must make your application via Cross-Defra Coordinator for the AMR National Action Plan - Civil Service Jobs - GOV.UK where you will find a full job description.  Closing Date  7 April 2025 "
